title: Shirahoshi’s Power Saves the Island

dialogue.text: QUEEN OTOHIME WAS MURDERED BY A HUMAN!!!

summary: Shirahoshi’s Power Saves the Island. This part advances the end of the Fish-Man Island conflict and the island’s attempt to move beyond inherited hatred.
